svg.text: How $700B in capex creates self-reinforcing social burdens

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about big tech AI capex spending plans')
sendPrompt('What does negative free cash flow mean for tech companies?')
g.text: Meta/Alphabet down ~90% · Amazon projected negative FCF

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does big tech debt issuance affect broader markets?')
sendPrompt('Who captures the productivity gains from AI investment?')
sendPrompt('How does AI displace workers and compress wages in practice?')
g.text: Hiring freezes · entry-level roles vanish · salaries cut pre-layoff
NZ: 34% firms already slowing junior hiring

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the NZ tax base erosion scenarios again')
g.text: NZ: $6–25B annual shortfall depending on scenario

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do rising welfare costs compound fiscal pressure on governments?')
sendPrompt('What happens to government debt when tax revenues fall and welfare rises simultaneously?')
sendPrompt('How does brain drain compound AI-related fiscal problems for small countries?')
sendPrompt('What policy interventions could break this negative feedback loop?')
g.text: Service cuts erode human capital · political instability rises
Weakened institutions → slower policy response → loop deepens
